response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the job requirements. They have also worked with various technologies and have a strong problem-solving ability.
strengths: Proficient in multiple programming languages including TypeScript and JavaScript
Experience with full-stack development and various frameworks
Strong background in software development with a focus on testable projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java for backend services
Basic German language skills may be a limitation
